phase1.body: Systems online. Factory chassis scan complete. Building your body is like tuning a performance car — the factory floor may be set, but how you break limits and extract every horsepower is where the fun begins. Welcome to Ultimate Physique.

profileInput.body: Before unlocking the performance console, the system must log your native chassis parameters (gender, age, height, weight). This data forges your powertrain ratios — enter it with precision.
profileInput.lockHint: Save your body specs to continue the power-on sequence.

phase2.body: This is your six-axis performance dashboard — your full vehicle spec readout. It reflects horsepower, torque, and pilot compatibility. Data does not lie; you set the engine's operating temperature.

phase3.body: Enter the dyno. Log your limit data and the system unlocks matching auras and tiers. Torque the bolts — start your first chassis calibration now.
